title: Welcome to SWG
excerpt: Welcome to Static Website Generator. Learn what SWG is, why it was built and how it helps you create modern static websites.
content:
# Welcome to SWG

Welcome to Static Website Generator (SWG).

SWG is a modern content management system designed specifically for static websites. It combines the simplicity of JSON-based content management with the flexibility of Astro themes.

## Why SWG?

Traditional CMS platforms often require databases, plugins and ongoing maintenance. SWG takes a different approach by making JSON the single source of truth while Astro handles the presentation layer.

## What You Can Build

With SWG you can create:

- Business websites
- Documentation portals
- Blogs
- Landing pages
- Marketing websites

## Designed for Developers

Themes are standard Astro projects. Build and test them locally, then package and import them directly into SWG without changing your code.

## Designed for Content Editors

Content editors can manage pages, blog posts, documentation and media through the administration interface while developers remain in control of the design and theme.

## Start Building

Browse the documentation, explore the example content and create your first Astro theme. Welcome to the SWG community!
meta_description: Welcome to Static Website Generator and discover a modern JSON-first CMS for Astro.
